title: MineShield items
description: This resource pack adds things related to MineShield (Works only with Optifine or CITresewn)
body:
## For correct work you need Optifine or [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
The resource pack adds items associated with the Mineshield which are obtained by renaming items in the anvil
The resource pack adds
The book of mineshield - to get it, you need to rename any book to "Книга майншилда", as well as the resource pack adds juice - to get it, rename a bottle of honey or water to "Сок Алфёша"
Resource pack can be used, for example, for role-playing games Well, or just use it for everyday play in a single world, as the book can be used as a decoration by placing it in a frame
## 👀Pictures of added items from the resource pack

![The Book of mineshield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82bfdb5282634cfe5eb02518a4aa7d446777000a.png)![Alfesha juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2736ed33be0eb18dfe8fe28cba51a5e86fb657bc.png)
